_products_lioness_the-mystique-midi-dres.noteText: The elasticated neckline is genuinely stretchy and accommodates a larger cup well. The structured bodice gives real shape. Sized up one as the waist runs small. Overall a strong fit for narrow-back / large-cup — the construction lives up to the score.

eliza-j.noteText: This v-neck style from Eliza J is one of the ONLY well fitting formal dresses I have found that is both flattering on the waist with proper tailoring and also fits my bust completely while flattering and providing lift with no bra needed. The v-neckline gives the bust room without cutting in, and the defined waist with flared skirt means the bodice can fit the chest without fighting the hip. The structured non-stretch fabric actually helps support a fuller bust very nicely. True to size, I'd go with your waist size. https://res.cloudinary.com/dihdcofux/image/upload/v1782306934/Subject_ejdp4f.png
